case_title: ANGEL K LAU VS. NASIR JAVAID et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS RESET. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, ANGEL K
NOTICE - THE ABOVE SMALL CLAIMS CASE HAS BEEN CONTINUED FOR HEARING TO FEB-25-2014 AT 10:00 AM. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON CO-DEFENDANT, WHO DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY LAU, ANGEL K AS TO DEFENDANT JAVAID, NASIR DBA NAZ AUTO SERVICE JOSEPH, DEJAUNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT DEJAUNA JOSEPH TO APR-16-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFENDANT DEJAUNA JOSEPH WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-19-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED DEC-17-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JAVAID, NASIR DBA NAZ AUTO SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT DEJAUNA JOSEPH TO AUG-04-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT DEJAUNA JOSEPH WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL L. MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU, ANGEL K IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JAVAID, NASIR DBA NAZ AUTO SERVICE JOSEPH, DEJAUNA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO NASIR JAVAID ON AUGUST 19, 2014. ENVELOPE STAMPED "RETURN TO SENDER-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-21-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-22-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-25-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON CO-DEFENDANT, WHO DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL CLERK: M.MANZELLA NOT REPORETD. ()

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2014 - DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO A JPT - CONTINUED TO AUG-19-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT, DEFENDANT NASIR JAVAID IS PRESENT. NOT APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DEJAUNA JOSEPH. JPT JEAN MILLEF, CLERK: B.PAREDES, NOT REPORTED (506)
RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS-CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEJAUNA JOSEPH ON 8-4-14. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$66.00) SERVED MAY-08-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH, DEJAUNA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2014 - JUDGMENT.
